lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਲਏ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਘਰਿ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape mel le sukhadaataa aap miliaa ghar aae |
lines.english: The Giver of peace has united me with Himself; He Himself has come to my home to meet me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਆਗੈ ਕਰਉ ਬਿਨੰਤੀ ਜੇ ਗੁਰ ਭਾਵੈ ਜਿਉ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਮਿਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: gur aagai krau binantee je gur bhaavai jiau milai tivai milaaeeai |
lines.english: I offer my prayers to the Guru; if it pleases the Guru, He shall unite me with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Gauree, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਹਾਗਣਿ ਨਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak kaaman sadaa suhaagan naa pir marai na jaae |4|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the soul-bride is forever the Lord's favorite wife; her Husband Lord does not die, and He shall never leave. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਮੋਹਨਿ ਮੋਹਿ ਲੀਆ ਜੀਉ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: man mohan mohi leea jeeo dubidhaa sehaj samaae |
lines.english: The Enticer of hearts has enticed her, and her sense of duality has been easily dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਣਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਬੇਧੀ ਜੀਉ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: kaaman har ras bedhee jeeo har kai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: The soul-bride is pierced through with the sublime essence of the Lord, in intuitive peace and poise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਕੂੜਿ ਕੁਸਤਿ ਭਰਿਆ ਗਲ ਤਾਈ ਪਾਪ ਕਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eihu sareer koorr kusat bhariaa gal taaee paap kamaae |
lines.english: This body is filled to overflowing with falsehood, deception and the commission of sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਏ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਵਰੁ ਪਾਏ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: dubidhaa sehaj samaae kaaman var paae guramatee rang laae |
lines.english: Her sense of duality has been easily dispelled, and the soul-bride obtains her Husband Lord; following the Guru's Teachings, she makes merry.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਸਹਜ ਧੁਨਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਗਤੀ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh bhagat jit sehaj dhun upajai bin bhagatee mail na jaae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh practices that devotional worship, by which the celestial music wells up; without this devotional worship, filth is not removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਣਿ ਪਿਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜੀਉ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਇ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kaaman pir paaeaa jeeo gur kai bhaae piaare |
lines.english: The soul-bride has found her Husband Lord, through the love and affection of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਪਿਰਹਿ ਪਿਆਰੀ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak kaaman pireh piaaree vichahu aap gavaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the soul-bride who sheds selfishness and conceit from within, is dear to her Beloved. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਣਿ ਸੁਖਿ ਸੁਤੀ ਜੀਉ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: rain sukh sutee jeeo antar ur dhaare |
lines.english: She passes her life-night sleeping in peace, enshrining the Lord in her heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰੇ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: antar ur dhaare mileeai piaare anadin dukh nivaare |
lines.english: Enshrining Him deep within her heart night and day, she meets her Beloved, and her pains depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਵੇ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: antar mehal pir raave kaaman guramatee veechaare |
lines.english: Deep within the mansion of her inner being, she enjoys her Husband Lord, reflecting upon the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਪੀਆ ਦਿਨ ਰਾਤੀ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਮਾਰਿ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam peea din raatee dubidhaa maar nivaare |
lines.english: She drinks deeply of the Nectar of the Naam, day and night; she conquers and casts off her sense of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਹੁ ਦਇਆ ਕਰੇ ਜੀਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਅਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aavahu deaa kare jeeo preetam at piaare |
lines.english: Come, and shower Your Mercy upon me, my most Darling, Dear Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਿ ਮਿਲੀ ਸੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਅਪਾਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sach milee sohaagan gur kai het apaare |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the happy soul-bride meets her True Lord, through the Infinite Love of the Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਣਿ ਬਿਨਉ ਕਰੇ ਜੀਉ ਸਚਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kaaman binau kare jeeo sach sabad seegaare |
lines.english: The soul-bride offers her prayers to You, to adorn her with the True Word of Your Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਾਰਜ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sach sabad seegaare haumai maare guramukh kaaraj savaare |
lines.english: Adorned with the True Word of Your Shabad, she conquers her ego, and as Gurmukh, her affairs are resolved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਕਾਮਿ ਵਿਆਪੀ ਮੋਹਿ ਸੰਤਾਪੀ ਕਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਜਾਇ ਪੁਕਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh kaam viaapee mohi santaapee kis aagai jaae pukaare |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is engrossed in sexual desire, and tormented by emotional attachment. With whom should she lodge her complaints?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਏਕੋ ਸਚਾ ਸੋਈ ਬੂਝੈ ਗੁਰ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jug jug eko sachaa soee boojhai gur beechaare |
lines.english: Throughout the ages, the One Lord is True; through the Guru's Wisdom, He is known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਥਾਉ ਨ ਪਾਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਅਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak manamukh thaau na paae bin gur at piaare |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the self-willed manmukh finds no place of rest, without the most Beloved Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧ ਇਆਣੀ ਭੋਲੀ ਨਿਗੁਣੀਆ ਜੀਉ ਪਿਰੁ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: mundh eaanee bholee niguneea jeeo pir agam apaaraa |
lines.english: The bride is foolish, ignorant and unworthy. Her Husband Lord is Unapproachable and Incomparable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗਣ ਬਖਸਣਹਾਰਾ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਕੰਤੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: avagan bakhasanahaaraa kaaman kant piaaraa ghatt ghatt rahiaa samaaee |
lines.english: The soul-bride's Beloved Husband Lord is the Forgiver of sins; He is contained in each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਜੀਉ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਣਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape mel mileeai jeeo aape bakhasanahaaraa |
lines.english: He Himself unites us in His Union; He Himself forgives us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਭਾਇ ਭਗਤੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਬੂਝ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: prem preet bhaae bhagatee paaeeai satigur boojh bujhaaee |
lines.english: The True Guru has made me understand this understanding, that the Lord is obtained through love, affection and loving devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜੇ ਹਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਾ ਧਨ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak sahaje har var paaeaa saa dhan nau nidh paaee |4|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, that soul-bride who obtains the nine treasures, intuitively obtains her Husband Lord. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦਿ ਰਹੈ ਦਿਨ ਰਾਤੀ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਹੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa anand rahai din raatee anadin rahai liv laaee |
lines.english: She remains forever in bliss, day and night; she remains immersed in His Love, night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਸਰੁ ਸਬਲੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਜੀਉ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਦੁਤਰੁ ਤਰਿਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa sar sabal varatai jeeo kiau kar dutar tariaa jaae |
lines.english: The sea of Maya is agitated and turbulent; how can anyone cross over this terrifying world-ocean?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Gauree, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਿ ਬੋਹਿਥਾ ਜੀਉ ਸਬਦੁ ਖੇਵਟੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam kar bohithaa jeeo sabad khevatt vich paae |
lines.english: Make the Lord's Name your boat, and install the Word of the Shabad as the boatman.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਖੇਵਟੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਪਾਏ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਲਘਾਏ ਇਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਦੁਤਰੁ ਤਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: sabad khevatt vich paae har aap laghaae in bidh dutar tareeai |
lines.english: With the Shabad installed as the boatman, the Lord Himself shall take you across. In this way, the difficult ocean is crossed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਕਾਟੇ ਭਏ ਪਵਿਤੁ ਸਰੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: khin meh raam naam kilavikh kaatte bhe pavit sareeraa |
lines.english: In an instant, the Lord's Name erases his sinful mistakes, and his body becomes pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਜੀਵਤਿਆ ਇਉ ਮਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh bhagat paraapat hovai jeevatiaa iau mareeai |
lines.english: The Gurmukh obtains devotional worship of the Lord, and thus remains dead while yet alive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ਕੰਚਨ ਭਏ ਮਨੂਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak raam naam nisataaraa kanchan bhe manooraa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Lord's Name, emancipation is obtained, and the slag iron is transformed into gold. ||1||
